name: Heizou/ the man the does not exist
description:
Lost, missing, forgotten or he was never there in the first place

He who does not exist

And only you who is more than a stranger, less than a friend nor neighbor remembers him

yeah, Dale suddenly remember the story of the classmate that was gone in China and the Uncle Martin? just an Uncle that everyone knows in a family but never really know him by recalling that small animation of the Helloween boy with an imagined out girl

and then decided to make this :p

ayy, I should make the classmate one OuO
